description: A vertical linked card displaying an image, eyebrow category label, title, and a 'Learn More' CTA. The entire card is a single link navigating to a section or detail page.

FR-01.title: Card Image
FR-01.description: The card MUST display an image at the top.

FR-02.title: Eyebrow Category Label
FR-02.description: The card MUST display an H2 eyebrow label indicating the content category.

FR-03.title: Card Title
FR-03.description: The card MUST display a title as an H4 heading.

FR-04.title: CTA Text
FR-04.description: The card MUST display a 'Learn More' CTA indicator.

FR-05.title: Full Card Link
FR-05.description: The entire card MUST be wrapped in a single anchor element.
acceptance: Click anywhere on card navigates to target page
Hover state applied to entire card (subtle shadow or scale effect)

accessibility.AC-01: Card link MUST have descriptive accessible name
accessibility.AC-02: Image MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-03: Hover/focus state MUST be clearly visible
